name: dinesh-portfolio-mern
description: MERN stack portfolio for Dinesh Kumar S

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: npm install --prefix server && npm start --prefix server
